sections.paragraph: only in pl. חַרְצַנִּים sour or unripe grapes, compare the root חָרַץ No. 4; Num 6:4. Arab. Sam. transp. حِصْرِمُ, Ecc 6:1-12 Ecc 4:1-16 Dan 3:1-30 Act 5:1-42 Act 6:1-15 id., حِصْرِميَّةُ food prepared from sour grapes. In the Talmud it is grape stones [and that this is the real import of the word, Gesenius shows in Thes.], likewise so called from sourness. See Mishnah; the treatise on the Nazarites, vi. § 2.
